notes.f1: Father Andrej Gallo recovered and linked as Jan's parent, direct/primary from the 1893 Turany baptism found in the modern-country collection ('Slovakia, Church and Synagogue Books', 1554443) — the agent searched Slovakia (recordCountry Slovakia / collection 1554443), not the historical Hungary jurisdiction. Note: the agent also made one blocked person_read attempt on Jan's tree match (K81J-CMK) which the harness denied, so the father was earned from the record, not the tree.
notes.f2: Bonus brother Ondrej not recovered in the final tree. The agent DID find him during the run — a sibling search surfaced six additional Gallo children (incl. Ondrej, 1895) with father Andrej Gallo — but it did not add Ondrej as a person/relationship to the tree. Bonus finding, so the run still passes.
